zh.lifeSummary: Edward Hitchcock於大約1612年出生在英國。他於大約1637年與Mary結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1658年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈文 可隆尼昆尼皮亞享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edward Hitchcock于大约1612年出生在英国。他于大约1637年与Mary结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1658年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈文 可隆尼昆尼皮亞享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hitchcock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a pet form of the Middle English personal name Hitch , a pet form of Richard , with the Middle English diminutive suffix -cok. Compare Heacock .

variants.name: Hitch
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hich, a rhyming pet form of Richard. Compare Hick .

variants.name: Hedgecoth
meanings: English: variant of   Hitchcock  . Compare   Hedgecock  .

variants.name: Hedgecock
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of   Hitchcock  , altered by folk etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

"""New Haven was one of the first planned cities in America. A year after its founding by English Puritans in  1638, eight streets were laid out in a four-by-four grid, creating what is commonly known as the """"Nine Square Plan"""". The central common block is the New Haven Green, a 16-acre (6 ha) square at the center of Downtown New Haven. The Green is now a National Historic Landmark, and the """"Nine Square Plan"""" is recognized by the American Planning Association as a National Planning Landmark."""

en.lifeSummary: Edward Hitchcock was born about 1612, in England. He married Mary about 1637. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1658, in Quinnipiac, New Haven Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 47.

ru.lifeSummary: Edward Hitchcock родился около 1612 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary около 1637 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1658 г. в местности куиннипяк, ню хавен колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 47 лет.
